thoughts_pipeline_1369715908283.content: P2T07/P2T07b are GitHub issue identifiers, not local task directories — globbing or grepping for them locally will find nothing and waste budget.

facts_pipeline_1369717304847.content: In this pipeline, task files (task.md, plan.md, review.md) are synthesized from GitHub issue context at runtime — do not search for local copies of prior task artifacts.
